zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Peyton於1498年出生在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾易斯勒哈姆時，他的父親Sir Robert Peyton30歲，母親Elizabeth Clere24歲。他於1516年1月與Frances Hasilden在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾坎布利其結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1550年8月1日在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾享年52歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾易斯勒哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Peyton于1498年出生在英国英格兰坎布利其爾易斯勒哈姆时，他的父亲Sir Robert Peyton30岁，母亲Elizabeth Clere24岁。他于1516年1月与Frances Hasilden在英国英格兰坎布利其爾坎布利其结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1550年8月1日在英国英格兰坎布利其爾享年52岁，埋葬在英国英格兰坎布利其爾易斯勒哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Peyton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Payton  .

variants.name: Payton
meanings: English (mainly West Midlands): habitational name from Peyton in Ramsholt (Suffolk), derived from the Old English personal name Pǣga + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

Irish (mainly County Donegal): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Peatáin ‘descendant of Peatán’, a pet form of the personal name Pádraig (see Patrick ). Outside County Donegal, the name is apparently mainly of English origin (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Peyton was born in 1498, in Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Robert Peyton, was 30 and his mother, Elizabeth Clere, was 24. He married Frances Hasilden in January 1516, in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 1 August 1550, in Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 52, and was buried in Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Peyton est né en 1498, à Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert Peyton, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Clere, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Frances Hasilden en janvier 1516, à Canteburge, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 1 août 1550, à Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Peyton 1498 in Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Peyton 30 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Clere 24. Er hat im Januar 1516 in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom Frances Hasilden geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 1. August 1550 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Peyton è nato il nel 1498 nel Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Robert Peyton, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Clere, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Frances Hasilden nel gennaio 1516, nel Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 1 agosto 1550, nel Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Peytonが1498年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアイスレハムで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Peytonは30歳，母Elizabeth Clereは24歳であった。1516年1月にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアカンブリッジでFrances Hasildenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1550年8月1日にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアで52歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアイスレハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Peyton(이)가 1498년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 이슬레함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Peyton(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Clere(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1516년 1월 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 캄브리지에서 Frances Hasilden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1550년 8월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 이슬레함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Peyton nasceu em 1498, em Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Robert Peyton, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Clere, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Frances Hasilden em janeiro de 1516, em Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de agosto de 1550, em Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Peyton родился в 1498 г. в местности ислэам, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Peyton было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Clere, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Frances Hasilden январь 1516 г. в местности камбридж, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 1 августа 1550 г. в местности камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности ислэам, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Peyton nació en 1498, en Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Robert Peyton, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Clere, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Frances Hasilden en enero de 1516, en Cantebriche, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 1 de agosto de 1550, en Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
